prompt: Document a qRT-PCR gene expression experiment. We measured VEGFA mRNA expression in HIF1α-stabilised hypoxic HCT116 colorectal cancer cells. Cells cultured in 0.5% O2 hypoxia for 24h vs normoxia (21% O2) controls. RNA extraction: RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen 74104, lot 163044162). cDNA synthesis: SuperScript III (ThermoFisher 18080044, lot 2395729, 1 µg RNA input). qPCR: TaqMan assay Hs00900055_m1 (VEGFA) and Hs02800695_m1 (HPRT1 housekeeping), QuantStudio 7 Flex, n=3 biological replicates. Primers: TaqMan predesigned (Applied Biosystems). Expected: 3-5 fold VEGFA upregulation in hypoxia.
